creator: xaa@stack.urc.tue.nl
text:
With 2 DEC cards the second interface randomly stops
	working.
	With 1 DEC and a WD8003 and the same configuration things
	work great.

Fix: 

Check for re-entrancy, I think
How-To-Repeat: 
	Build the machine? :-)
	ping 1.1.1.255
	wait until only the host itself is in the ping list
